items.title: Kenvue Inc. (KVUE): A Bull Case Theory
items.description: We came across a bullish thesis on Kenvue Inc. on Danny’s Substack by Danny Green. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on KVUE. Kenvue Inc.’s share was trading at $18.66 as of February 19th. KVUE’s trailing and forward P/E were 24.93 and 17.01, respectively according to Yahoo Finance. items.title: Is It Too Late To Consider Johnson & Johnson (JNJ) After Its Strong 1 Year Rally?
items.description: If you are wondering whether Johnson & Johnson is still fairly priced after its recent run, this article will help you weigh what you are paying against what you are getting. The stock last closed at US$248.43, with reported returns of 2.4% over 7 days, 9.1% over 30 days, 19.8% year to date, 54.7% over 1 year and 83.3% over 5 years. These figures may have some investors reassessing both upside potential and risk. Recent headlines around Johnson & Johnson have continued to focus on its...
